version_description: Complete and well aligned chord sheet / thoroughly ear-transcribed.

versions.version_description: Many of the submissions were wrong. I listened carefully to each harmony and have it correct.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
                    Hotline Bling – Drake
---------------------------------------------------------------------------

Written by: Aubrey Graham/Paul Jefferies/Timmy Thomas
Published 2015
http://digg.com/video/drake-hotline-bling-video

Tabbed by: maguri
Tuning: Standard

VERSE: The D chord at the end  of the verse can also be played without the 3rd
       if one does not want to highlight it
BRIDGE: The letters in the square brackets indicate single notes only, 
        NOT full chords.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------

[tab]CHORDS
       E-A-D-G-B-e
Bbmaj7 x-1-3-2-3-1
Am7    x-0-2-2-1-3 (or x-0-2-0-1-0)
C/G    3-x-2-0-1-0
D      x-x-0-2-3-2 or D(omit3) x-x-0-2-3-x[/tab]

---------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Intro]
| no chord | % | % | % |
| no chord | % | % | % |

(You used to call me on my ...
You used to, you used to ...
Yeah)
